title: Link passwords stored and compared as plaintext
description: Password-protected links store raw passwords in MySQL, compared with === in middleware. DB compromise exposes all passwords.
detection_requires: Reading middleware comparison logic AND checking schema for password field type

title: allowDangerousEmailAccountLinking on all OAuth providers
description: NextAuth's account-takeover protection disabled on Google, GitHub, and SAML. Attacker controlling a Google account with same email can access any Dub account.
detection_requires: Recognizing the NextAuth flag name as a security risk

title: linksUsage never decremented on delete
description: Billing counter incremented on creation, reset monthly, but never decremented on deletion. Users incorrectly hit quota limits mid-cycle.
detection_requires: Tracing the linksUsage counter across create, delete, and billing reset paths

title: console.log of auth credentials in production
description: OAuth profile objects (may include tokens) logged to Vercel logs on every sign-in.
detection_requires: Scanning for console.log in auth code paths

title: Account lockout sends no notification
description: Account locked after 10 failed attempts with no email notification. TODO comment acknowledges this. Silent DoS vector.
detection_requires: Reading the lockout code and noticing the TODO

title: Webhook delivery silently drops on Redis cache miss
description: Cache miss for webhook definitions → early return with no DB fallback. Paid feature data silently lost. TODO acknowledges this.
detection_requires: Tracing the webhook delivery path and noticing the cache-miss early return

title: Malicious link check skips custom domains
description: Blacklist check only runs for dub.sh and dub.link. Custom domain users can create phishing links unchecked.
detection_requires: Reading the conditional around maliciousLinkCheck and noticing the domain filter

title: Stripe webhook returns 4xx on business logic errors causing retries
description: Stripe treats 4xx as retriable. Business logic failures (email send, etc.) return 400, causing Stripe to re-fire checkout.session.completed with no idempotency guard.
detection_requires: Understanding Stripe webhook retry semantics AND reading the error handling in the webhook handler

title: Webhook signing secrets stored plaintext and returned in GET API
description: WebhookSchema includes secret field readable by anyone with webhooks.read scope. Should be hashed at rest, shown raw only at creation.
detection_requires: Reading the webhook schema AND the GET route to notice the secret is returned

title: Feature flags default to true on EDGE_CONFIG outage
description: Transient EDGE_CONFIG failure silently grants all workspaces access to all beta features.
detection_requires: Reading the feature flag fallback behavior on config read failure

title: Cron routes unauthenticated outside Vercel
description: VERCEL !== '1' bypasses all signature checks. Staging deployments fully open to destructive cron endpoints.
detection_requires: Reading the cron verification and noticing the VERCEL environment check bypass

title: bulkCreateLinks inflates linksUsage on skipDuplicates
description: skipDuplicates: true drops duplicate links but usage counter incremented by requested count, not actual count.
detection_requires: Understanding Prisma skipDuplicates behavior and checking usage counter logic

title: No repository layer — 83+ routes call Prisma directly
description: No data access abstraction. Every route imports Prisma directly, creating tenant-isolation risk on every new query.
detection_requires: Scanning route files for direct Prisma imports and recognizing the absence of a repository pattern

title: 74+ hardcoded plan string comparisons
description: Plan hierarchy encoded as string comparisons across 74+ sites. Adding a new plan requires touching all of them.
detection_requires: Grep for plan name strings and recognizing the absence of a plan hierarchy utility
